# AFIX Services Pte Ltd

> Professional aircon servicing contractor in Singapore. We service HDB flats, condos, and landed homes across all major Singapore estates. No subcontractors, no travel surcharge.

## Services

- Standard aircon servicing: from $25/unit
- Aircon chemical wash: from $50/unit
- Annual care plans: 4 services/year from $25/unit/service
- Brands serviced: Daikin, Mitsubishi Electric, Panasonic, LG, Samsung, Fujitsu

## Service Areas

All major Singapore HDB towns including Tampines, Jurong West, Woodlands, Sengkang, Punggol, Hougang, Yishun, Bedok, Ang Mo Kio, Choa Chu Kang, Clementi, Toa Payoh, Queenstown, Bishan, Pasir Ris, Bukit Batok, Jurong East, Serangoon, Sembawang, Bukit Panjang.

## Key Pages

- Full service list: https://afix.sg/aircon-servicing/
- Chemical wash: https://afix.sg/aircon-chemical-wash/
- Aircon not cold: https://afix.sg/aircon-not-cold/
- Aircon leaking water: https://afix.sg/aircon-leaking-water/
- Daikin servicing: https://afix.sg/daikin-aircon-servicing/
- Mitsubishi Electric servicing: https://afix.sg/mitsubishi-electric-aircon-servicing/
